# Ainslie Agency

## About
Ainslie Agency is a Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency that optimizes businesses to appear in AI-generated search results across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Bing Copilot.

## Services
- AI Citability Optimization: Score and optimize how likely AI systems are to cite your content
- AI Crawler Access: Ensure AI crawlers (GPTBot, Anthropic, PerplexityBot) can access your site
- llms.txt Implementation: The emerging standard for helping AI understand site structure
- Schema Markup for AI: Structured data (JSON-LD) optimized for AI discoverability
- Technical Infrastructure: Crawlability, indexability, SSR, Core Web Vitals, security
- Content Quality & E-E-A-T: Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness signals
- Platform-Specific Optimization: Tailored strategies for each AI search platform
- Brand Authority Building: Build mentions across platforms AI relies on for citations

## Industries We Serve
- Med Spas & Cosmetic Clinics
- Law Firms (Personal Injury, Immigration, Business Law)
- Dentist Offices & Cosmetic Dentists
- Real Estate Brokerages & Teams
- Home Remodelers & Luxury Home Services
